use_cases: Video content playback on websites with customizable controls
Tutorial and educational video players for e-learning platforms
Product demonstration videos in e-commerce storefronts
Entertainment media playback for streaming applications
Corporate video hosting and internal training content
ai_summary: A feature-rich video player component with playback controls including play/pause, volume, fullscreen, and time navigation. Features auto-hiding controls overlay, responsive sizing variants, and supports poster images and custom video sources. Designed for seamless integration across media, education, and e-commerce platforms with minimalist styling that keeps focus on content.
